narrative:
Euclid City has 34,239 registered voters, with 57.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 4.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 38.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 34.2 percentage points.
